tasks.label: Codex: exec + notify
args: /Users/tujing/.nvm/versions/node/v20.19.4/bin/codex exec "${input:prompt}"; EC=$?; if [ $EC -eq 0 ]; then /usr/local/bin/terminal-notifier -title "Codex" -message "完了" -sound default -timeout 10; else /usr/local/bin/terminal-notifier -title "Codex" -message "失敗 (exit $EC)" -sound default -timeout 10; fi; exit $EC

inputs.default: 変更点を反映してビルドエラーを直して
